data.name: Furry Feet 2
data.detailed_description:
The game

Welcome to Furry Feet2, the long awaited sequel to our challenging puzzle game, each level comes with an increase in difficulty. 3 Unique exclusive and exciting puzzle formulas await you.

Features

- Enjoy 12 levels challenging levels.

- Play through our 3 distinct puzzle formulas.

- Completing levels unlock new gallery art, revealing its artwork.
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: The long awaited sequel to the hit "Furry Feet" is here, and improved in every conceivable way.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
